title: Clean Main Menu(No Logo)
description: This resource pack removes the logo from the main menu and provides a cleaner look.
body:
# **Clean Main Menu(No Logo)**

### This resource pack removes the logo from the main menu and provides a cleaner look.
![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0152786264e0805bceb8bf3075b0d5e0f3fa1cc.png)

_Note: In order for the splash text to disappear, you must enter and exit a world/server when you first activate the texture pack._

## How To Install

Download the zip file and place it in your ``.minecraft/resourcepacks`` folder
### Where is the .minecraft/resourcepacks folder?
- In Windows it is usually ``%AppData%\.minecraft\resourcepacks``
- In Linux it is usually ``$HOME/.minecraft/resourcepacks``
- On MacOS it is usually ``~/Library/Application Support/minecraft/resourcepacks``
